front: What are the ICH guidelines for peptide drug safety testing?
back: ICH M3(R2): Nonclinical safety studies timing. ICH S6(R1): Preclinical safety of biotechnology-derived pharmaceuticals (includes peptides). ICH S5(R3): Reproductive toxicology. Key requirements: pharmacology, PK, single/repeat dose toxicity, genotoxicity, local tolerance.
